items.name_en: рЯФ•Every year Luo releases a unique white canvas bag рЯТДand it's always very popular. The year before last there was the Toast bag, last year the Paula's bag, and this year we welcome the latest Cushion Tote bag~~Simply amazing! вЬЕрЯСївЭ§пЄПFeaturing exclusive custom Taiwan-imported canvas paired with imported calfskin рЯТ•A drawstring-style opening with knotted cords at the four corners, and an internal fixed "support" structure to maintain shape. The style is very novel and unique рЯТЛadding practicality to the casual open-top bag. рЯСНрЯСНрЯСНA solid choice for vacation and commuting~рЯТѓ

items.name_en: рЯФ•New Paseo Chain Style Small Dumpling BagрЯФ• Imported Nappa leather creates a lazy yet high-class vibeрЯТ• Exquisite craftsmanship, simple and elegant silhouetteрЯМє Beauty and utility combined, can be carried by hand, over shoulder, or crossbody, capacity is also greatрЯМЈ Suitable for French elegance, modern style, and sweet cool style alike. The handle goes through the body, bringing a unique soft and ultra-light pleated structureрЯТД "Paseo" is the new form of the L0рЯТЛewe dumpling bag! This bag, which appears most often on the runway, is named "Paseo" рЯСЬ Meaning "stroll" in Spanish, it has a casual yet playful styleрЯТД The bag features a streamlined look, shaped like a dumplingв≠РпЄП The handle is a drawstring design, with knotted buckle elements on both sides continuing the Flamenco series, top zipper closure, and reinforced with circular stitching at the bottomрЯМЮ Simple yet full of details, overall atmospheric and softрЯОБ Size: 35~21~11.5CM

items.name_en: рЯФ•New Version Geometric Mini Nappa Suede Featherlight Puzzle Handbag, Imported Nappa CalfskinрЯТ•Outlines a rectangular shape with unique geometric lines. Soft and lightweight Nappa leather gives the bag a casual and lazy style.*Shoulder, Crossbody, or Handheld*Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, featuring a rotating buckle*Zipper closure, articulated zipper pull*One external zippered back pocket, one internal slip pocket*Detachable, featuring a hidden pocket and balloon dice*Rectangular metal studs*рЯТДThis small size version is made of soft Nappa calfskin*The Mini Puzzle can fit for example a large walletрЯСЫAll sizes of phonesрЯУ±and sunglassesрЯХґCarried crossbody, shoulder, handbag, or top handle*DetachableрЯТЩрЯТЪ
